title: A Quantitative Assessment of Economic Impact of Trade Wars and the ‘Make in India’ Program

summary.about: The combined economic effects of Make in India policies and the 2017–18 global trade war.
summary.audience: Indian industrial, trade and investment policymakers.
summary.method: Runs applied general-equilibrium simulations of investment incentives, protectionist measures and trade-war shocks.
summary.insights: The combined policies can benefit the overall economy while still weakening exports, jobs and investment in important sectors.
